text: hakim:4664 - Abi Bakr IsmaTl b. al-Faqgih Bi-al-Rray > Abti Hatim Muhammad b. 1drs > Kathir b. Yahya > Aba ‘Awanah Dawud b. Abti ‘Awf > ‘Abd al-Rahman b. Abt Ziyad >‘Abdullah b. al-Harith b. Nawfal > Abai Sa1d al-Khudr1 [Machine] The Prophet £ entered upon Fatimah and said, "Indeed, me, you, and this sleeper, meaning Ali, and these two, meaning Hasan and Husayn, will be in the same place on the Day of Judgment." @ - Sound (Dhahabi)
